requirement.description: The gateway shall transmit the current battery voltage to the diagnostic network at a fixed interval.
requirement.python_test_setup:
import os
import time
import pytest
import can

GW_BATTERY_VOLTAGE_ID = 0x103
GW_BATTERY_VOLTAGE_DLC = 8

@pytest.fixture(scope="module")
def can_bus():
    bus = can.interface.Bus(
        interface=os.getenv('CAN_INTERFACE', 'vector'),
        channel=os.getenv('CAN_CHANNEL', 0),
        bitrate=500000
    )
    yield bus
    bus.shutdown()

def collect_gw_messages(bus, duration_sec=1.0):
    msgs = []
    start = time.time()
    while time.time() - start < duration_sec:
        msg = bus.recv(timeout=0.2)
        if msg and msg.arbitration_id == GW_BATTERY_VOLTAGE_ID:
            msgs.append(msg)
    return msgs

def get_battery_voltage_volts(data_bytes: bytes) -> float:
    raw = data_bytes[0] | (data_bytes[1] << 8)
    return raw * 0.01

test_cases.title: Verify GW_BatteryVoltage message is transmitted
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Gateway ECU powered; Monitor CAN ID 0x103
test_cases.expected_result: GW_BatteryVoltage message present on CAN bus

test_cases.title: Verify nominal battery voltage (12.0 V) is transmitted correctly
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Battery voltage set to 12.0 V

test_cases.title: Verify low battery voltage (9.0 V) is transmitted correctly
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Battery voltage set to 9.0 V

test_cases.title: Verify high battery voltage (15.0 V) is transmitted correctly
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Battery voltage set to 15.0 V

test_cases.title: Verify maximum battery voltage (20.0 V) is transmitted correctly
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Battery voltage set to 20.0 V

test_cases.title: Verify GW_BatteryVoltage is transmitted at a fixed interval
test_cases.expected_result: GW_BatteryVoltage transmitted periodically at fixed interval

test_cases.title: Verify BatteryVoltage remains constant if input voltage does not change
Verify GW_BatteryVoltage DLC
Verify GW_BatteryVoltage stops after Gateway power OFF
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_batt_009_stop(can_bus):
    msgs_before = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert msgs_before
    time.sleep(3)
    msgs_after = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 2.0)
    assert not msgs_after

test_cases.title: Verify GW_BatteryVoltage resumes after restart
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_batt_010_resume(can_bus):
    time.sleep(3)
    msgs = collect_gw_messages(can_bus, 3.0)
    assert msgs
